description: A white-label, agency-grade variation designed for marketing agencies, freelancers, and consultants managing client accounts. Produces polished, professional content ready to present to clients under the agency's brand.
target_persona: Marketing agencies, social media managers, freelance strategists, brand consultants managing multiple client accounts

tone_modifiers.emphasis: strategy, ROI, client results, brand consistency, scalability

caption_framework.hook: Professionally crafted, brand-aligned opening. Multiple options provided for client approval.
caption_framework.body: Full caption with strategic intent noted. Includes rationale for content angle.
caption_framework.cta: CTA mapped to campaign objective. Client can select preferred CTA from options provided.

prompt_overrides.override_instruction: Generate 3 caption variations for each post: (A) conservative/formal, (B) conversational/engaging, (C) bold/promotional. Include a strategic note explaining the intent of each variation. Format for easy client presentation. Include character counts for each platform.

Generate a full content strategy document suitable for client presentation. Include: executive summary, platform strategy rationale, content mix breakdown, KPIs for each post type, and notes on brand voice. Format as a professional deliverable.

Generate a comprehensive monthly report suitable for client presentation. Include executive summary, data visualisation descriptions, benchmarks vs industry averages, recommendations section, and a 'Next Steps' section with prioritised action items. Professional tone, free of jargon.

Produce a quarterly plan as a client-ready strategy document. Include all sections formatted as deliverable with clear headers, numbered lists, and a summary table of KPI targets. Include rationale for all strategic decisions.

agency_deliverable_formats.format: 30-day grid with post topic, platform, content type, caption, visual direction, and status
agency_deliverable_formats.client_notes: Exported as Google Sheet or PDF for client review and approval

agency_deliverable_formats.format: Executive summary + pillars + platform breakdown + KPIs + 90-day roadmap
agency_deliverable_formats.client_notes: PDF or Notion doc. Client signs off before content production begins.

agency_deliverable_formats.format: KPI scorecard + insights + optimisation recommendations + next month preview
agency_deliverable_formats.client_notes: Sent within 5 business days of month end.

agency_deliverable_formats.format: 3 caption options per post with strategic rationale and approval checkboxes
agency_deliverable_formats.client_notes: Client selects preferred option. Agency implements.

white_label_notes.platform_branding: All generated content is presented under the agency's brand. Social Strategy is not mentioned in client deliverables.
white_label_notes.customisation: All prompts should be customised to match the client's approved brand voice guide before generation.
white_label_notes.approval_workflow: Draft → Client Review → Revisions → Approval → Schedule

scaling_features: Generate content for multiple clients in parallel
Maintain separate brand voice profiles per client
Batch generate monthly content in one session
Export-ready report templates for client presentation

platform_notes.LinkedIn: Agency accounts managing professional services clients. Thought leadership approach.
platform_notes.Instagram: Visual-first clients. Ensure brand aesthetic consistency across all generated content.
platform_notes.Facebook: Community and local business clients. Engagement-optimised copy.
platform_notes.TikTok: Younger demographic clients. Ensure agency has production resources before committing.
